item.dc:creator: lydecker17

item.title: White people shit theme
item.description:
I am white... like white- white. Very white. Ghost white. Basic white bitch white. Can I talk to the manager white. I find this shit funny and like poking fun at "my people". Laugh with me.
I love asking them to explain what they mean when they make racist comments or make some sort of implication. Yeah, uncle Bob. I know what you WANT me to ASSUME but nah.
Guilty
I got invited to a gender reveal recently for some black friends. I looked at my husband and said "I thought that was something only white ppl do!" Then, we were the only white folks there. Just thought it was funny.
Every male relative of mine.
Guilty
My husband's friends call him the "light skinned-ed brotha" and has permission to use the "n-word". It hilarious. He's literally the only white guy in his 2 friend groups.
It's a jeep thing.
My son got suspended from school (8 years ago) for pointing out a black kids shirt was the same color as his skin. Admin said it was racist and all I could think of was this same scenario as this meme. It always gets a double take. It's not racist.
I found WAY too many of these ENTIRELY accurate. Hope you enjoyed!
item.dc:creator: justyouraveragepeacock

item.title: hey media lab. this ones for you
item.description: and also for the old imgur owners who decided to sell them selves to such a notoriously shit company. context: imgur was sold by the owners to medialab, a notoriously bad company that also owns kik, worldstar, and the song matching app genius among other things. Medialab axed the rest of the old employees of imgur recently. the imgur we knew is officially dead and done. Medialab has a history of trying to get out of paying the full price it agrees to in contracts. how imgur couldnt see this shit happening is beyond me.

item.title: Robert correct again
item.description: The six largest health insurers reported more than $1 trillion in revenue and more than $31 billion in net income last year — and are now pushing to raise Americans’ premiums by as much as 66 percent for some policies, according to recent state regulatory filings. Those increases come as insurers dole out billions on stock buybacks and dividends that help drive up CEO compensation and line the pockets of investors.
item.dc:creator: IliveINyourHEADrentFREE

item.title: Body painted myself as The Mummy - MCroft07
item.description: II saw these lenses and was like WELP add to basket! Thanks for all the nice comments, it's appreciated. Now for the big whammy faq Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I don’t recreate the reference photo like for like so I’ve put in a photo, but I prefer to change parts of the design to make it more “my version”. I haven't seen the film, I don't watch a lot of films because I am spending my time painting I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! If you're still here I’m about to go live on Twitch today to paint Faith Connors from Mirror's edge! Loved that game I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: Anonymous - Rigged 2024 - No Cheats Protests Monthly
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/election-interference-christopher-titus-Ec0GJy0
Musk Involvement Timeline: https://imgur.com/gallery/musk-election-involvement-timeline-jwGHvS0
https://westchester.news12.com/lawsuit-challenges-2024-election-results-in-rockland-county https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/elections/online-vulnerable-experts-find-nearly-three-dozen-u-s-voting-n1112436 (Proof that voting machines can in fact be hacked and also can access the internet) https://www.wric.com/business/press-releases/ein-presswire/776992724/analysis-of-2024-election-results-in-clark-county-indicates-manipulation/ (Nevada officially opens investigation into 2024 election fraud) https://electiontruthalliance.org/clark-county%2C-nv (Clark County early vote tally shows manipulation) https://smartelections.substack.com/p/the-press-release (Article ties all data together and why it matters) https://smartelections.us/dropoff (Article explains “drop-off” why we collect the data and what it means) https://apnews.com/article/election-security-voting-machines-software-2024-80a23479d8a767ba9333b2324c4e424b A 2021 article warning about 2024 elections being at risk for fraud https://electiontruthalliance.org/pennsylvania Pennsylvania showing same manipulation. https://electiontruthalliance.org/mebane-pa-working-paper Dr. Mebane university of Michigan expert on worldwide election fraud has concluded Pennsylvania likely manipulated https://dissentinbloom.substack.com/p/the-machines-were-changed-before. Voting machines altered without public knowledge. https://electiontruthalliance.org/statements%2Fpress-releases#255f8bd8-29e0-416d-953e-bd3afa9ce3c6 https://freepress.org/article/2024-presidential-and-senate-results-called-question-lawsuit-advances
Election Truth Alliance investigations https://imgur.com/gallery/election-interference-C3X9ouY
Google Doc of voting anamolies https://docs.google.com/document/d/1whdbN8U3JPQ3mcMhyA8XJt8YDmF9mPQ10t8asNdlrWI/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.n8w6esm7fqn0
Election Truth Alliance is looking for voters in Allegheny, Cambria, and Centre counties PA who are willing to be plaintiffs in their upcoming cases there which will seek hand recounts of paper ballots. If you feel your 2024 vote was not counted, or you had other concerning issues with voting in those counties, contact the ETA https://electiontruthalliance.org/contact-us/
The first of the monthly No Cheats Protests
August 2, 2025, is the first of the monthly No Cheats Protests
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: When is a jail not a jail?
item.description: When it is an "involuntary civil commitment facility". Round up the homeless, put them in camps "for their own good". https://www.axios.com/2025/07/25/civil-commitment-trumps-homelessness-policy
item.dc:creator: JarJarDrinks

item.title: Her acting is so good, you'd think she's like that for real
item.dc:creator: Agarast
